package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for not_found_semantics_implemented_by_nil_nil_return: Repository or service APIs that encode missing records as `nil, nil` with no explicit result contract.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule102NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule102NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule102NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario102Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule102NegativeService, input Rule102NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
